sidebar.bookmarkletHint: Save from any site in one click

empty.title: Start bookmarking
empty.description: AllMarks uses a bookmarklet that saves any site in one click
empty.alreadyInstalled: Already installed? Click 📌 on another site

bookmarkletModal.title: Install the bookmarklet
bookmarkletModal.dragInstruction: ↑ Drag this to your browser's bookmarks bar
bookmarkletModal.barHint: If you can't see the bookmarks bar:
bookmarkletModal.usageStep1: 1. Open a site you want to save

tweet.deleted: This post was deleted or is private

share.defaultText: Made a bookmark collage and it turned out amazing ✨ #AllMarks

triage.hint: CLICK TO TOGGLE TAGS · SPACE TO SKIP · Z TO UNDO

hero.label: Visual Bookmark Manager
hero.headline: Turn links into a visual board.
hero.description: Save videos, social posts, articles, and images in one click, then arrange them freely. Turn a plain list of text into an inspiration board you grasp at a glance. No sign-up, completely free.

problem.headline: You pile them up and never look again.
problem.body: A bland column of blue links. Timelines you only scroll past. Don't let what you save get buried in a wall of text.

capture.title: One click, from anywhere.
capture.body: Posts on X, YouTube videos, articles, shops, images — send them straight to your board via the extension, the bookmarklet, or a pasted URL.

layout.title: Arrange it freely.
layout.body: Drag and drop to set size and position exactly how you like.

live.title: Play several videos at once.
live.body: Videos across your board move together — not a list of stills, but a board that's actually alive.

organize.title: Tag to sort. Theme to restyle.
organize.body: Filter by tag, and switch the whole look with themes. More themes are on the way.

privacy.title: No account. Fully local.
privacy.body: Everything is saved only inside your browser. Nothing is sent to a server. Your privacy stays yours.

share.headline: Share it as one board.
share.body: Export your finished board as an image, or share a link — your exact layout arrives just as you made it.
